dismissalText.commentary: Mitchell Marsh c Naman Dhir b Bosch 44 (25b 4x4 3x6 50m) SR: 176

dismissalComment.html: Bosch strikes again!! Both set batters are gone in this over. The ball flies flat to the man at deep midwicket. Another short delivery, and this one with a cross seam, around fifth stump. There's some extra bounce for Bosch, and Marsh looks to ride it. He thumps the ball really hard, but not powerfully enough and neither in the gap

dismissalText.commentary: Josh Inglis c Yadav b Ghazanfar 13 (5b 3x4 0x6 12m) SR: 260

dismissalComment.html: got him!! A mistimed pull from Inglis. A quicker ball from AMG on middle, and short in length. The ball turns away slightly, and Inglis looks to repeat the pull which got him the boundary first ball. But all he manages to do is sky it for Suryakumar at mid-on. The MI captain moves back a few steps, and gobbles it

dismissalText.commentary: Nicholas Pooran c †Rickelton b Bosch 63 (21b 1x4 8x6 31m) SR: 300

dismissalComment.html: tickled behind!! Rickelton knew he had his man the moment the ball left the bat. Rather, the glove. Bosch banged it short and just outside leg at 139kph. Pooran dominated short balls all day, but this one climbs much higher. He goes for the pull, but ends up gloving it behind for Rickelton, who's up in celebration even before completing the catch. The end of a tremendous innings

dismissalText.commentary: Josh Inglis c Yadav b Ghazanfar 13 (5b 3x4 0x6 12m) SR: 260

dismissalComment.html: got him!! A mistimed pull from Inglis. A quicker ball from AMG on middle, and short in length. The ball turns away slightly, and Inglis looks to repeat the pull which got him the boundary first ball. But all he manages to do is sky it for Suryakumar at mid-on. The MI captain moves back a few steps, and gobbles it

dismissalText.commentary: Nicholas Pooran c †Rickelton b Bosch 63 (21b 1x4 8x6 31m) SR: 300

dismissalComment.html: tickled behind!! Rickelton knew he had his man the moment the ball left the bat. Rather, the glove. Bosch banged it short and just outside leg at 139kph. Pooran dominated short balls all day, but this one climbs much higher. He goes for the pull, but ends up gloving it behind for Rickelton, who's up in celebration even before completing the catch. The end of a tremendous innings

dismissalComment.html: Bosch strikes again!! Both set batters are gone in this over. The ball flies flat to the man at deep midwicket. Another short delivery, and this one with a cross seam, around fifth stump. There's some extra bounce for Bosch, and Marsh looks to ride it. He thumps the ball really hard, but not powerfully enough and neither in the gap
